scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:core:e2e && npm run test:e2e:extension-packages && npm run test:website:e2e
scripts.test:regression: npm run build:regression && turbo run test:unit --filter=xmlui && npm run test:core:e2e && npm run test:e2e:extension-packages
scripts.build:website-extensions: npm --workspace xmlui-docs-blocks run build && npm --workspace xmlui-website-blocks run build && npm --workspace xmlui-search run build && npm --workspace xmlui-masonry run build && npm --workspace xmlui-gauge run build && npm --workspace xmlui-echart run build && npm --workspace xmlui-calendar run build && npm --workspace xmlui-grid-layout run build && npm --workspace xmlui-tiptap-editor run build
scripts.build:website-extensions:metadata: npm --workspace xmlui-docs-blocks run build:metadata && npm --workspace xmlui-website-blocks run build:metadata && npm --workspace xmlui-search run build:metadata && npm --workspace xmlui-masonry run build:metadata && npm --workspace xmlui-gauge run build:metadata && npm --workspace xmlui-echart run build:metadata && npm --workspace xmlui-calendar run build:metadata && npm --workspace xmlui-grid-layout run build:metadata && npm --workspace xmlui-tiptap-editor run build:metadata
scripts.verify:website-extensions: npm run build:website-extensions && npm run build:website-extensions:metadata && npm run test:e2e:extension-packages
scripts.build:regression: turbo run build:core --filter=xmlui && turbo run build:extension --filter='./packages/*'
scripts.verify:website: npm --workspace xmlui-website run build && npm --workspace xmlui-website run build-ssg && npm --workspace xmlui-website run verify:preview-ssg && npm run test:website:e2e
